title: Captain Rotch's Waterfront Sighting
description: Captain Rotch, haggard and hollow-eyed on the deck of the Dartmouth, tells you in a defeated murmur that he saw a man matching Greenleaf's description — slight, spectacled, wearing a brown coat — speaking in low tones with a customs officer near the gangplank this afternoon. He did not think much of it at the time. He also mentions that a folded document changed hands, sealed with red wax, before the two men parted ways without looking back.
